channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: iOS 18’s Vocal Actions let you swap Siri for Google Assistant or ChatGPT
item.description: While Siri is becoming more useful in iOS 18, Apple’s next big software update also includes an easier way to invoke other voice assistants instead. It’s called Vocal Actions, and it allows you to trigger custom actions with any wake phrase of your choosing.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Wise says some customer accounts affected by Evolve data breach
item.description: Evolve ransomware attack led to a data breach, but other companies including Wise have also been affected.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Windows 11 runs into more trouble as Microsoft halts rollout of new features in testing
item.description: Microsoft has paused the latest batch of Windows 11 features due to testers flagging up some evidently serious problems.
item.dc:creator: alekshamcloughlin@outlook.com (Aleksha McLoughlin) , TechRadar

item.title: Notion introduces a new tool for website publishing
item.description: Notion Sites offers plenty of customization and add-on options, making it easy to build a simple website.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: French antitrust charges threaten Nvidia amid AI chip market surge
item.description: Nvidia is at risk of facing charges from the French antitrust authority for alleged anti-competitive behavior, a potential first in regulatory actions against the AI chip giant, according to a report by Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Lenovo Enhances Data Center Cooling with Expanded Neptune Range, Empowers Heat Reuse
item.description: As AI adoption grows in data centers, Lenovo introduces new AI solutions and expands its Neptune cooling range to efficiently manage increasing power demands, enabling heat reuse and optimized data center performance.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How evolving AI regulations impact cybersecurity
item.description: While their business and tech colleagues are busy experimenting and developing new applications, cybersecurity leaders are looking for ways to anticipate and counter new, AI-driven threats. It’s always been clear that AI impacts cybersecurity, but it’s a two-way street.
item.dc:creator: Ram Movva and Aviral Verma, Info World

item.title: Hijos de Rivera aúna supercomputación e IA para investigar “los sabores del futuro”
item.description: Hijos de Rivera está desarrollando un ambicioso proyecto de investigación en el que, según relatan, por primera vez a nivel mundial se ha utilizado la computación cuántica y la inteligencia artificial (IA) para realizar una simulación de la percepción del sabor.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Progress in ICT industry policy and cybersecurity standards drive MENA and Central Asia toward an intelligent era
item.description: Telecom networks are an integral backbone of the digital infrastructure that powers our economies today. They’re the driving force behind every industry’s digital transformation, connecting businesses, people, and information like never before.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: California considers unique safety regulations for AI companies, but faces tech firm opposition
item.description: California lawmakers are weighing a bill that would regulate powerful artificial intelligence systems.
item.dc:creator: Trân Nguyễn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Apple Reclassifies iPhone X, Original AirPods and HomePod as 'Vintage' Technology
item.description: Apple reclassifies iconic iPhone X and original AirPods as vintage technology, marking the beginning of their journey to obsolescence. This move signals Apple's intention to discontinue support for these products.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: OpenSSH vulnerability regreSSHion puts millions of servers at risk
item.description: Researchers have uncovered a serious remote code execution vulnerability in the Open Secure Shell (OpenSSH) server that could let unauthenticated attackers obtain a root shell on servers and take them over.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Flawed Lung Transplant Algorithm Prioritizes Some Patients Over Others, Putting Lives at Risk
item.description: A recently introduced algorithm for allocating lungs to transplant patients has been found to be flawed, resulting in a significant disadvantage for individuals with Type O blood, ultimately harming those most in need of life-saving treatment.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Royal Pratt, The Mercury News

item.title: Eclipse Theia IDE arrives for desktop, browser
item.description: The Eclipse Foundation has announced the release of the Eclipse Theia IDE. Based on the Theia cloud and desktop IDE framework implemented in TypeScript, the Theia IDE is avialable for Windows, Linux, and macOS and can be tried online.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 10 voice scams to watch out for – and your quick action plan
item.description: Any potential scammer can copy a voice with cheap, accurate AI software in their bid to swindle you out of big money. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: EU Rules Meta's 'Pay or Consent' Ad Model Violates Digital Market Regulations
item.description: The European Union has found that Meta's advertising model, which requires users to either pay for online content or consent to targeted ads, violates the bloc's Digital Markets Act (DMA) in preliminary findings released Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: The technology powering Taylor Swift, Netflix and the Sphere
item.description: Disguise is a pioneer in an exploding market for visual graphics in demand from Hollywood to the NBA.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: The Supreme Court keeps on hold efforts in Texas and Florida to regulate social media platforms
item.description: The Florida and Texas laws were signed by Republican governors in the months following decisions by Facebook and Twitter, now X, to cut then-President Donald Trump off over his posts related to the Jan. 6, 2021, attack on the U.S. Capitol by his supporters.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Supreme Court punts on Texas, Florida social media laws
item.description: The Supreme Court on Monday wiped lower court rulings regarding two state laws aimed at barring social media companies from banning users based on their political views, kicking the major First Amendment challenge down the road.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, The Hill

item.title: DoD’s Joint Staff GenAI sprint lays out 8 internal use cases
item.description: Lt. Gen. Todd Isaacson, the CIO for the Joint Chiefs of Staff/J-6, said a review team is completing recommendations for leadership around using GenAI. The post DoD’s Joint Staff GenAI sprint lays out 8 internal use cases first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: How to trace and block anonymous calls
item.description: Do you want to prevent scam calls? Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses how to block hidden IDs on your phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boeing acquiring supplier Spirit AeroSystems for $4.7B
item.description: Boeing said Monday that it plans to purchase Spirit AeroSystems in a $4.7 billion all-stock deal decades after it spun off the supplier. The planemaker has for years outsourced parts of its production process to the Spirit.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, The Hill

item.title: European Union accuses Facebook owner Meta of breaking digital rules with paid ad-free option
item.description: European Union regulators have accused social media company Meta Platforms of breaching the bloc’s new digital competition rulebook by forcing Facebook and Instagram users to choose between seeing ads or paying to avoid them.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Autonomous trash-gobbling robot boat wages war on waterway waste
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson provides the details on the Class 3 Clearbot: an autonomous vessel for efficient marine trash/plant removal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 8 AI-powered apps that’ll actually save you time
item.description: You can’t open your eyes these days without seeing something about generative AI and all the reasons it’s, like, totally gonna revolutionize the way you work. And yet, call me surly, but most of the AI tools out there at this point seem far less impressive in practice than they do on paper.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Why (and perhaps how) Apple Intelligence will make money
item.description: We’ll leave it to future retrospectives to show us if it turns out be a good or a bad thing, but artificial intelligence will change everything, so of course Apple is building a business around it. That shouldn’t surprise anyone.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Previews: What’s in the latest build?
item.description: The Windows 11 2023 Update has been released, but behind the scenes, Microsoft is constantly working to improve the newest version of Windows.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: InfoWorld Technology of the Year Awards 2024 Nominations Now Open
item.description: The 2024 InfoWorld Technology of the Year Awards will recognize the best and most innovative products across 26 categories in software development, cloud computing, data analytics, and AI and machine learning. Nominations for the 2024 awards are now open.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Instagram creators could soon make AI versions of themselves
item.description: Think you've seen them? Meta said “AI” will appear in front of the creator’s name followed by a “beta” tag after.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Animal rescuers try to keep dozens of dolphins away from Cape Cod shallows after mass stranding
item.description: Animal rescuers were trying to keep dozens of dolphins away from shallow waters around Cape Cod after 125 of the creatures earlier stranded themselves.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mastering Password Overload: Expert Strategies for Effective Management
item.description: With hundreds of passwords to remember, it's no wonder people feel overwhelmed. Discover expert-approved techniques for streamlining password management and regaining control over your online presence.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Preparing Workers for AI Era: States Enhance Tech Skills to Stay Ahead
item.description: With many jobs expected to rely on generative artificial intelligence, states are implementing initiatives to help workers upgrade their tech skills, ensuring they remain relevant in a rapidly changing job market.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon is reviewing whether Perplexity AI improperly scraped online content
item.description: Amazon is reviewing claims that the artificial intelligence startup Perplexity AI is scraping content — including from prominent news sites — without approval.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Navigating the future of healthcare: Transformation, measurement and integration
item.description: How will healthcare continue to transform? The post Navigating the future of healthcare: Transformation, measurement and integration first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Vatican City to Replace Electromagnetic Emissions with Solar Power in North Rome
item.description: Pope Francis has decreed that a Vatican Radio territory in northern Rome, previously blamed for electro-smog, will be converted into a solar farm to fuel Vatican City. The move is driven by the Vatican's commitment to sustainability and its pledge at the United Nations.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Where tech, politics & giving meet: CEO Nicole Taylor considers Silicon Valley's busy intersection
item.description: Nicole Taylor has an insider's view of philanthropic trends from her seat as the president and CEO of the Silicon Valley Community Foundation.
item.dc:creator: THALIA BEATY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AI image-generator startup Stability AI looks for reshoot with new CEO and investor group
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The troubled artificial intelligence company behind image-generator Stable Diffusion is looking for a reshoot with a new CEO and a surge of investment from a group that includes Sean Parker, Facebook’s former president and Napster's co-founder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
